---
layout: paper
title: "Neuroformationв„ў v1.0 вЂ” Cross-References"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.19197818"
---

# Neuroformationв„ў v1.0 вЂ” Cross-References & Integration Map

**Back to:** [Main Paper](index.html) | [Visualizations](neuroformation-visualizations.html) | [Bibliography](neuroformation-master-bibliography.html)

---

## Paper Series вЂ” Neuroformationв„ў Methodology Stack

This is Paper 1 of 4 in the foundational methodology series.

| Paper | Role | DOI | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Neuroformationв„ў v1.0** (this paper) | Parent methodology вЂ” five-layer architecture | [10.5281/zenodo.19197791](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19197791) | вњ… Published |
| **Elevation Gridв„ў v1.1** | Diagnostic instrument вЂ” 3Г—3 coordinate map | [10.5281/zenodo.18790842](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18790842) | вњ… Published |
| **Neural Access Methodв„ў v1.0** | Transmission protocol вЂ” ACCESSв†’REFRAMEв†’SIMPLIFYв†’IGNITE | Manuscript in preparation | рџ”„ Forthcoming |
| **Cognitive Mage v1.0** (updated) | Origin paper вЂ” human-AI co-discovery with NF foundation | [10.5281/zenodo.17643267](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17643267) | рџ”„ Update forthcoming |

---

## Layer в†’ Tool Mapping

| Five-Layer Architecture | Elevation Gridв„ў Row | NAM Step | Primary Paper |
|---|---|---|---|
| Layer 1 вЂ” Substrate | Row 1 (Hardware) | ACCESS | Neuroformationв„ў v1.0 (this) |
| Layer 2 вЂ” Signal Processing | Row 1 (Hardware) | SIMPLIFY | Neuroformationв„ў v1.0 (this) |
| Layer 3 вЂ” Learning/Reinforcement | Row 2 (Software) | REFRAME | Elevation Gridв„ў v1.1 |
| Layer 4 вЂ” Identity | Row 3 (Architecture) | IGNITE | Elevation Gridв„ў v1.1 |
| Layer 5 вЂ” Purpose | Row 3 (Architecture) | IGNITE | Neuroformationв„ў v1.0 (this) |

---

## VGS Framework Cross-References

Neuroformationв„ў is the parent methodology. These VGS frameworks are outputs of it applied to AI system stability:

| Framework | Function | DOI |
|---|---|---|
| Synoetic OSв„ў v1.0 | AI-side implementation of Neuroformationв„ў architecture | [10.5281/zenodo.17808864](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17808864) |
| MI Agents v1.0 (UNICA) | Cross-domain statistical validation П‡ВІ(4) = 3.21 | [10.5281/zenodo.17770533](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17770533) |
| Cognitive Mage v1.0 | Origin paper вЂ” human-AI co-discovery | [10.5281/zenodo.17643267](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17643267) |
| DCN v1.0 | 9-agent coordination вЂ” 600% productivity | [10.5281/zenodo.17555568](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17555568) |
| UTME v1.0 | Learning acceleration Оі=0.31 dayвЃ»В№ | [10.5281/zenodo.17497149](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17497149) |
| MBM v1.0 | Memory Breathing Methodology вЂ” bio-inspired AI memory | [10.5281/zenodo.18790096](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18790096) |
| PME v1.0 | Predictive Myelination Engine | [10.5281/zenodo.18318485](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18318485) |

---

## Five Academic Disciplines

Neuroformationв„ў sits at the intersection of five fields simultaneously:

| Discipline | Connection | Key Citations |
|---|---|---|
| D1 вЂ” Performance Coaching Methodology | 28+ year applied record is the primary validation dataset | Schmidt 1975, Ericsson et al. 1993, Vealey 2007 |
| D2 вЂ” Complex Adaptive Systems Theory | CSFC cascade model is CAS theory applied to identity systems | Wiener 1948, Friston 2010, Holland 1992 |
| D3 вЂ” Symbolic Logic & Recursive Cognition | Framework Forge process is recursive self-reference operational | Hofstadter 1979 |
| D4 вЂ” Computational Substrate Theory | П‡ВІ(4)=3.21, p=0.523 consistent with substrate-independence framework | Tegmark 2014, Chalmers 1996, Putnam 1967 |
| D5 вЂ” Narrative Identity Architecture | SIFв†’COLLAPSE is narrative identity disruption sequence | McAdams 1993, Ricoeur 1992, Herman 1992 |

**Best academic home:** 4E Cognition (embodied, embedded, enacted, extended) + Resilience Engineering

---

## ORCID Publication Record

All papers: [orcid.org/0009-0000-9923-3207](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-9923-3207)

GitHub repository: [github.com/Feirbrand/synoeticos-public](https://github.com/Feirbrand/synoeticos-public)

---

*2026 В© ValorGrid Solutions. [Main Paper](index.html)*
